content:
I can see the paper content provided, but it only includes the abstract and header information. The abstract mentions "a scheme based on mediated data-sharing that improves efficiency," but the actual policy section with operational details about the mediated data-sharing scheme is not included in the excerpt you've provided.

To answer your questions about:
1. How the scheme operationally de-correlates information
2. Testable predictions about welfare improvement

I would need access to the full policy/mechanism section of the paper where this scheme is formally described and analyzed.

Could you provide the relevant section of the paper that contains the mediated data-sharing scheme details? This would typically be in a section labeled "Policy," "Mechanism Design," "Solutions," or similar.
